name: Hazbin Hotel Season 2
description:
I’ve seen a few bots, but none were quite what I wanted, so as they say, if you want something done right, do it yourself. This bot takes place AFTER season 2, however there will also be a second intro to make your own story entirely, so you can be anywhere in the Hazbin story but with the bot knowing all about the characters! The actual setup intro will involve the user being someone new at the hotel that catches the crew’s eye, be they a new overlord, an angel, or just a particularly promising looking sinner primed for Charlie’s grueling therapy sessions that likely involve far too much glitter. The floor is yours as to where to take this story, and who knows, maybe someone will predict what’s to come in season 3.

Well, that’s probably about enough out of me, but one more thing. I’ll try to have the characters as true to themselves as possible, but we all know how LLMs can be at times. I, of course, recommend using Proxy with this bot, as that is what it’ll have been tested in and written to be used with. Now, without further ado! Get in there, make your story as you see fit, and feel free to leave comments, I’ll be sure to read them.

(Added the Vees and Cherri, and updated some of the info in the personality.)

Since this bot has become my most popular by far, I’ll say this here. Feel free to commission/give bot ideas. I’m always happy to give something a try!
creator: TheDapperCrusader
